option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <androidx.core.widget.NestedScrollView xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:fillViewport="true">
<androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent">
<androidx.appcompat.widget.Toolbar android:id="@+id/toolbarCart" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="70dp" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent">
<androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:fontFamily="@font/poppins_light" android:text="My Cart" android:textColor="@color/black" android:textSize="20sp" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" tools:layout_editor_absoluteY="19dp" />
</androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout> </androidx.appcompat.widget.Toolbar>
<androidx.constraintlayout.widget.Guideline android:id="@+id/rightGuideLine" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:orientation="vertical" app:layout_constraintGuide_percent="0.96" />
<androidx.constraintlayout.widget.Guideline android:id="@+id/leftGuideLine" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:orientation="vertical" app:layout_constraintGuide_percent="0.04" />
<androidx.constraintlayout.widget.Guideline android:id="@+id/bottomGuideLine" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:orientation="horizontal" app:layout_constraintGuide_percent="0.68" />
<androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView android:id="@+id/rvCart" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="0dp" android:layout_marginTop="5dp" app:layout_constraintBottom_toTopOf="@id/bottomGuideLine" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="@id/rightGuideLine" app:layout_constraintHorizontal_bias="0.0" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="@id/leftGuideLine" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/progressbarCart" app:layout_constraintVertical_bias="1.0" tools:listitem="@layout/cart_product_item" />
<com.google.android.material.progressindicator.LinearProgressIndicator android:id="@+id/progressbarCart" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:indeterminate="true" android:visibility="invisible" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/toolbarCart" />
<androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout android:id="@+id/totalBoxContainer" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="50dp" android:background="@drawable/total_box_background" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="@id/rightGuideLine" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="@id/leftGuideLine" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/bottomGuideLine">
<TextView android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginStart="10dp" android:layout_marginTop="15dp" android:layout_marginBottom="15dp" android:fontFamily="@font/sf_pro_display" android:text="Total" android:textColor="@color/black" android:textSize="16sp" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvTotalPrice" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="15dp" android:layout_marginEnd="10dp" android:layout_marginBottom="15dp" android:fontFamily="@font/sf_pro_display" android:text="$150" android:textColor="@color/black" android:textSize="16sp" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" />
</androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/buttonCheckout" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="@dimen/mediumButtonHeight" android:layout_marginTop="45dp" android:layout_marginBottom="20dp" android:text="Check out" android:textColor="@color/white" android:backgroundTint="@color/g_blue" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="@id/rightGuideLine" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="@id/leftGuideLine" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/totalBoxContainer" />
<androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout android:id="@+id/layout_cart_empty" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:visibility="gone">
<ImageView android:id="@+id/imageEmptyBoxTexture" android:layout_width="200dp" android:layout_height="250dp" android:src="@drawable/ic_empty_box_texture" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="@id/imageEmptyBox" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="@id/imageEmptyBox" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="@id/imageEmptyBox" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="@id/imageEmptyBox"/>
<ImageView android:id="@+id/imageEmptyBox" android:layout_width="120dp" android:layout_height="120dp" android:layout_marginBottom="130dp" android:background="@drawable/empty_box_background" android:src="@drawable/ic_empty_box" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:fontFamily="@font/poppins_light" android:gravity="center" android:text="@string/your_shopping_cart_is_empty" android:textColor="@color/black" android:textSize="15sp" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/imageEmptyBoxTexture" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="@id/imageEmptyBoxTexture" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="@id/imageEmptyBoxTexture"/>
</androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>
</androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>
</androidx.core.widget.NestedScrollView>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <androidx.core.widget.NestedScrollView xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="@android:color/white" android:fillViewport="true">
<androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent">
<androidx.appcompat.widget.Toolbar android:id="@+id/toolbarCart" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="70dp" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent">
<androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:fontFamily="@font/poppins_light" android:text="My Cart" android:textColor="@color/black" android:textSize="20sp" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" tools:layout_editor_absoluteY="19dp" />
</androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout> </androidx.appcompat.widget.Toolbar>
<androidx.constraintlayout.widget.Guideline android:id="@+id/rightGuideLine" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:orientation="vertical" app:layout_constraintGuide_percent="0.96" />

<androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView android:id="@+id/rvCart" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="0dp" android:layout_marginTop="5dp" app:layout_constraintBottom_toTopOf="@id/bottomGuideLine" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="@id/rightGuideLine" app:layout_constraintHorizontal_bias="0.0" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="@id/leftGuideLine" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/progressbarCart" app:layout_constraintVertical_bias="1.0" tools:listitem="@layout/cart_product_item" />
<com.google.android.material.progressindicator.LinearProgressIndicator android:id="@+id/progressbarCart" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:indeterminate="true" android:visibility="invisible" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/toolbarCart" />
<androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout android:id="@+id/totalBoxContainer" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="50dp" android:background="@drawable/total_box_background" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="@id/rightGuideLine" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="@id/leftGuideLine" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/bottomGuideLine">
<TextView android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginStart="10dp" android:layout_marginTop="15dp" android:layout_marginBottom="15dp" android:fontFamily="@font/sf_pro_display" android:text="Total" android:textColor="@color/black" android:textSize="16sp" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvTotalPrice" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="15dp" android:layout_marginEnd="10dp" android:layout_marginBottom="15dp" android:fontFamily="@font/sf_pro_display" android:text="$150" android:textColor="@color/black" android:textSize="16sp" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" />
</androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/buttonCheckout" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="@dimen/mediumButtonHeight" android:layout_marginTop="45dp" android:layout_marginBottom="20dp" android:text="Check out" android:textColor="@color/white" android:backgroundTint="@color/g_blue" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="@id/rightGuideLine" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="@id/leftGuideLine" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/totalBoxContainer" />
<androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout android:id="@+id/layout_cart_empty" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:visibility="gone">
<ImageView android:id="@+id/imageEmptyBoxTexture" android:layout_width="200dp" android:layout_height="250dp" android:src="@drawable/ic_empty_box_texture" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="@id/imageEmptyBox" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="@id/imageEmptyBox" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="@id/imageEmptyBox" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="@id/imageEmptyBox"/>
<ImageView android:id="@+id/imageEmptyBox" android:layout_width="120dp" android:layout_height="120dp" android:layout_marginBottom="130dp" android:background="@drawable/empty_box_background" android:src="@drawable/ic_empty_box" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:fontFamily="@font/poppins_light" android:gravity="center" android:text="@string/your_shopping_cart_is_empty" android:textColor="@color/black" android:textSize="15sp" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/imageEmptyBoxTexture" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="@id/imageEmptyBoxTexture" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="@id/imageEmptyBoxTexture"/>
</androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>
</androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>
</androidx.core.widget.NestedScrollView>

option.name: filePath
option.value: /fragment_detail_product (snapshot).xml

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <androidx.core.widget.NestedScrollView xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:fillViewport="true">
<androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent">
<!-- ViewPager2 for product images --> <androidx.viewpager2.widget.ViewPager2 android:id="@+id/viewPagerProductImages" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="350dp" android:layout_marginTop="20dp" android:layout_marginStart="10dp" android:layout_marginEnd="10dp" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" />
<!-- Close button overlay --> <ImageView android:id="@+id/imageClose" android:layout_width="40dp" android:layout_height="40dp" android:src="@drawable/ic_close" android:padding="8dp" app:tint="@color/white" android:contentDescription="Close" android:background="@drawable/button_close_background" android:scaleType="centerInside" android:layout_marginTop="30dp" android:layout_marginEnd="20dp" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvProductName" style="@style/h3" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginStart="10dp" android:layout_marginTop="25dp" android:layout_marginEnd="10dp" android:text="Lofcoding" android:textStyle="bold" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/viewPagerProductImages" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvProductPrice" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:layout_marginStart="10dp" android:layout_marginEnd="10dp" style="@style/h3" android:textColor="@color/g_gray700" android:textStyle="bold" android:textSize="18sp" android:text="6.000 VND" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/tvProductName" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" />
<View android:id="@+id/topLine" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="1dp" android:background="@color/g_line" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/tvProductPrice" android:layout_marginStart="10dp" android:layout_marginEnd="10dp" android:layout_marginTop="10dp"/>
<LinearLayout android:id="@+id/linearProductPref" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/topLine" android:layout_marginTop="30dp" android:layout_marginStart="10dp" android:layout_marginEnd="10dp">
<!-- Colors Section --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:layout_marginBottom="20dp">
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvProductColors" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" style="@style/h3" android:textColor="@color/black" android:textStyle="bold" android:text="Màu sắc" />
<androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView android:id="@+id/rvColors" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="10dp"/> </LinearLayout>
<!-- Sizes Section --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical">
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvProductSize" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" style="@style/h3" android:textColor="@color/black" android:textStyle="bold" android:text="Kích cỡ" />
<androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView android:id="@+id/rv_sizes" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="10dp"/> </LinearLayout>
</LinearLayout>
<!-- Product Description with Read More --> <TextView android:id="@+id/tvProductDescription" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" style="@style/h3" android:textColor="@color/g_gray700" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/linearProductPref" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="@id/linearProductPref" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="@id/linearProductPref" android:textSize="14sp" android:layout_marginTop="24dp" android:maxLines="3" android:ellipsize="end" android:text="Mô tả sản phẩm..."/>
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvReadMore" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Xem thêm" android:textColor="@color/g_blue" android:textStyle="bold" android:textSize="14sp" android:paddingTop="4dp" android:paddingBottom="8dp" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/tvProductDescription" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="@id/tvProductDescription" />
<!-- Reviews Section --> <LinearLayout android:id="@+id/layoutReviews" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/tvReadMore" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="@id/linearProductPref" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="@id/linearProductPref">
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvReviewsTitle" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" style="@style/h3" android:textColor="@color/black" android:textStyle="bold" android:text="Đánh giá" />
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:layout_marginTop="6dp">
<RatingBar android:id="@+id/ratingSummary" style="@style/Widget.AppCompat.RatingBar.Small" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:isIndicator="true" android:numStars="5" android:rating="0" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvReviewCount" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginStart="8dp" android:text="(0 đánh giá)" android:textColor="@color/g_gray700" android:textSize="12sp" /> </LinearLayout>
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:layout_marginTop="12dp">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Viết đánh giá" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="@color/black" android:textSize="14sp" />
<RatingBar android:id="@+id/ratingInput" style="@style/Widget.AppCompat.RatingBar.Small" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="6dp" android:numStars="5" android:rating="0" android:stepSize="1" android:isIndicator="false" android:clickable="true" android:focusable="true" android:focusableInTouchMode="true" />
<EditText android:id="@+id/etReviewComment" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:background="@drawable/input_field_background" android:hint="Nhận xét về sản phẩm" android:padding="10dp" android:textColor="@color/black" android:textColorHint="@color/g_gray500" android:minLines="2" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnSubmitReview" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="40dp" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:text="Gửi đánh giá" android:textSize="14sp" android:backgroundTint="@color/g_blue" android:textColor="@color/white" /> </LinearLayout>
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvNoReviews" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="10dp" android:text="Chưa có đánh giá" android:textColor="@color/g_gray700" android:textSize="12sp" android:visibility="gone" />
<androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView android:id="@+id/rvReviews" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" /> </LinearLayout>
<!-- Actions Row --> <LinearLayout android:id="@+id/layoutActionButtons" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" android:layout_marginBottom="20dp" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/layoutReviews" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="@id/linearProductPref" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="@id/linearProductPref" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent">
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/buttonCreateMockup" android:layout_width="@dimen/mediumButtonHeight" android:layout_height="@dimen/mediumButtonHeight" android:layout_marginEnd="12dp" android:contentDescription="Tạo mockup" android:text="" app:icon="@drawable/ic_plus" app:iconTint="@color/white" app:iconGravity="textStart" android:backgroundTint="@color/g_green" android:enabled="false" android:alpha="0.5" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/buttonAddToCart" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="@dimen/mediumButtonHeight" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="@string/add_to_cart" android:textSize="16sp" android:backgroundTint="@color/g_blue" android:textColor="@color/white" /> </LinearLayout>
</androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>
</androidx.core.widget.NestedScrollView>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <androidx.core.widget.NestedScrollView xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:fillViewport="true">
<androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent">
<!-- ViewPager2 for product images --> <androidx.viewpager2.widget.ViewPager2 android:id="@+id/viewPagerProductImages" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="350dp" android:layout_marginTop="20dp" android:layout_marginStart="10dp" android:layout_marginEnd="10dp" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" />
<!-- Close button overlay --> <ImageView android:id="@+id/imageClose" android:layout_width="40dp" android:layout_height="40dp" android:src="@drawable/ic_close" android:padding="8dp" app:tint="@color/white" android:contentDescription="Close" android:background="@drawable/button_close_background" android:scaleType="centerInside" android:layout_marginTop="30dp" android:layout_marginEnd="20dp" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvProductName" style="@style/h3" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginStart="10dp" android:layout_marginTop="25dp" android:layout_marginEnd="10dp" android:text="Lofcoding" android:textStyle="bold" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/viewPagerProductImages" />
<androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout android:id="@+id/layoutPriceRow" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:layout_marginStart="10dp" android:layout_marginEnd="10dp" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/tvProductName" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent">
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvProductPrice" style="@style/h3" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:textColor="@color/g_gray700" android:textStyle="bold" android:textSize="18sp" android:text="6.000 VND" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toStartOf="@id/buttonCreateMockup" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/buttonCreateMockup" android:layout_width="@dimen/mediumButtonHeight" android:layout_height="@dimen/mediumButtonHeight" android:contentDescription="Tao mockup" android:text="" app:icon="@drawable/ic_plus" app:iconTint="@color/white" app:iconGravity="textStart" android:backgroundTint="@color/g_blue" android:enabled="false" android:alpha="0.5" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" /> </androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>
<View android:id="@+id/topLine" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="1dp" android:background="@color/g_line" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/layoutPriceRow" android:layout_marginStart="10dp" android:layout_marginEnd="10dp" android:layout_marginTop="10dp"/>
<LinearLayout android:id="@+id/linearProductPref" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/topLine" android:layout_marginTop="30dp" android:layout_marginStart="10dp" android:layout_marginEnd="10dp">
<!-- Colors Section --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:layout_marginBottom="20dp">
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvProductColors" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" style="@style/h3" android:textColor="@color/black" android:textStyle="bold" android:text="Màu sắc" />
<androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView android:id="@+id/rvColors" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="10dp"/> </LinearLayout>
<!-- Sizes Section --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical">
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvProductSize" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" style="@style/h3" android:textColor="@color/black" android:textStyle="bold" android:text="Kích cỡ" />
<androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView android:id="@+id/rv_sizes" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="10dp"/> </LinearLayout>
</LinearLayout>
<!-- Product Description with Read More --> <TextView android:id="@+id/tvProductDescription" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" style="@style/h3" android:textColor="@color/g_gray700" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/linearProductPref" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="@id/linearProductPref" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="@id/linearProductPref" android:textSize="14sp" android:layout_marginTop="24dp" android:maxLines="3" android:ellipsize="end" android:text="Mô tả sản phẩm..."/>
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvReadMore" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Xem thêm" android:textColor="@color/g_blue" android:textStyle="bold" android:textSize="14sp" android:paddingTop="4dp" android:paddingBottom="8dp" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/tvProductDescription" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="@id/tvProductDescription" />
<!-- Reviews Section --> <LinearLayout android:id="@+id/layoutReviews" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/tvReadMore" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="@id/linearProductPref" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="@id/linearProductPref">
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvReviewsTitle" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" style="@style/h3" android:textColor="@color/black" android:textStyle="bold" android:text="Danh gia" />
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:layout_marginTop="6dp">
<RatingBar android:id="@+id/ratingSummary" style="@style/Widget.AppCompat.RatingBar.Small" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:isIndicator="true" android:numStars="5" android:rating="0" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvReviewCount" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginStart="8dp" android:text="(0 đánh giá)" android:textColor="@color/g_gray700" android:textSize="12sp" /> </LinearLayout>
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvNoReviews" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="10dp" android:text="Chưa có đánh giá" android:textColor="@color/g_gray700" android:textSize="12sp" android:visibility="gone" />
<androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView android:id="@+id/rvReviews" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" /> </LinearLayout>
<!-- Actions Row --> <LinearLayout android:id="@+id/layoutActionButtons" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" android:layout_marginBottom="20dp" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/layoutReviews" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="@id/linearProductPref" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="@id/linearProductPref" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent">
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/buttonAddToCart" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="@dimen/mediumButtonHeight" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="@string/add_to_cart" android:textSize="16sp" android:backgroundTint="@color/g_blue" android:textColor="@color/white" /> </LinearLayout>
</androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>
</androidx.core.widget.NestedScrollView>

option.name: filePath
option.value: /fragment_home (snapshot).xml

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="@color/white">
<!-- Search Box (at top) --> <TextView android:id="@+id/tv_search" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="45dp" android:layout_marginStart="16dp" android:layout_marginEnd="16dp" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" android:background="@drawable/search_box_background" android:fontFamily="@font/poppins_thin" android:hint="@string/g_search_now" android:paddingStart="@dimen/_12sdp" android:singleLine="true" android:textColor="@color/g_icon_tint" android:textSize="@dimen/_12ssp" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:drawableEnd="@drawable/ic_search" android:padding="10dp" android:drawablePadding="10dp" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" />
<!-- Banner Carousel (below search) --> <androidx.viewpager2.widget.ViewPager2 android:id="@+id/vp_banner" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="180dp" android:layout_marginStart="16dp" android:layout_marginEnd="16dp" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" android:background="@drawable/banner_rounded_background" android:clipToOutline="true" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/tv_search" />
<!-- Banner Dots Indicator --> <com.google.android.material.tabs.TabLayout android:id="@+id/tl_dots" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_gravity="center_horizontal" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/vp_banner" app:tabBackground="@drawable/tab_selector" app:tabGravity="center" app:tabIconTint="@color/primary_color" app:tabIndicatorHeight="0dp" />
<!-- Main Content Container --> <ScrollView android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="0dp" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/tl_dots">
<LinearLayout android:id="@+id/ll_content" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="16dp">
<!-- Best Deal Title --> <TextView android:id="@+id/tv_best_deal_title" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/best_deals" android:textSize="18sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="@color/g_black" android:layout_marginTop="20dp" />
<!-- Best Deal RecyclerView - Horizontal scroll --> <androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView android:id="@+id/rv_best_deals" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="220dp" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:clipToPadding="false" android:paddingEnd="8dp" android:scrollbars="none" />
<!-- Hot-selling Products Title --> <TextView android:id="@+id/tv_hot_selling_title" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/hot_selling_products" android:textSize="18sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="@color/g_black" android:layout_marginTop="28dp" />
<!-- Hot-selling Products RecyclerView - Vertical scroll --> <androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView android:id="@+id/rv_hot_selling" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:nestedScrollingEnabled="false" />
<!-- Best Sellers Title --> <TextView android:id="@+id/tv_best_sellers_title" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="⭐ Best Sellers" android:textSize="18sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="@color/g_black" android:layout_marginTop="28dp" />
<!-- Best Sellers RecyclerView - Horizontal scroll --> <androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView android:id="@+id/rv_best_sellers" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="220dp" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:clipToPadding="false" android:paddingEnd="8dp" android:scrollbars="none" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp" />
</LinearLayout>
</ScrollView>
</androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>

option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="@color/white">
<!-- Search Box (at top) --> <TextView android:id="@+id/tv_search" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="45dp" android:layout_marginStart="16dp" android:layout_marginEnd="16dp" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" android:background="@drawable/search_box_background" android:fontFamily="@font/poppins_thin" android:hint="@string/g_search_now" android:paddingStart="@dimen/_12sdp" android:singleLine="true" android:textColor="@color/g_icon_tint" android:textSize="@dimen/_12ssp" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:drawableEnd="@drawable/ic_search" android:padding="10dp" android:drawablePadding="10dp" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" />
<!-- Banner Carousel (below search) --> <androidx.viewpager2.widget.ViewPager2 android:id="@+id/vp_banner" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="180dp" android:layout_marginStart="16dp" android:layout_marginEnd="16dp" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" android:background="@drawable/banner_rounded_background" android:clipToOutline="true" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/tv_search" />
<!-- Banner Dots Indicator --> <com.google.android.material.tabs.TabLayout android:id="@+id/tl_dots" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_gravity="center_horizontal" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/vp_banner" app:tabBackground="@drawable/tab_selector" app:tabGravity="center" app:tabIconTint="@color/primary_color" app:tabIndicatorHeight="0dp" />
<!-- Main Content Container --> <ScrollView android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="0dp" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/tl_dots">
<LinearLayout android:id="@+id/ll_content" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="16dp">
<!-- Best Deal Title --> <TextView android:id="@+id/tv_best_deal_title" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/best_deals" android:textSize="18sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="@color/g_black" android:layout_marginTop="20dp" />
<!-- Best Deal RecyclerView - Horizontal scroll --> <androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView android:id="@+id/rv_best_deals" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="220dp" android:layout_marginStart="-8dp" android:layout_marginEnd="-8dp" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:clipToPadding="false" android:paddingStart="0dp" android:paddingEnd="8dp" android:scrollbars="none" />
<!-- Hot-selling Products Title --> <TextView android:id="@+id/tv_hot_selling_title" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/hot_selling_products" android:textSize="18sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="@color/g_black" android:layout_marginTop="28dp" />
<!-- Hot-selling Products RecyclerView - Vertical scroll --> <androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView android:id="@+id/rv_hot_selling" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:nestedScrollingEnabled="false" />
<!-- Best Sellers Title --> <TextView android:id="@+id/tv_best_sellers_title" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="⭐ Best Sellers" android:textSize="18sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="@color/g_black" android:layout_marginTop="28dp" />
<!-- Best Sellers RecyclerView - Horizontal scroll --> <androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView android:id="@+id/rv_best_sellers" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="220dp" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:clipToPadding="false" android:paddingEnd="8dp" android:scrollbars="none" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp" />
</LinearLayout>
</ScrollView>
</androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>

option.name: filePath
option.value: /fragment_login (snapshot).xml

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:fitsSystemWindows="true" android:paddingStart="24dp" android:paddingEnd="24dp" android:background="@color/white">
<!-- Title --> <TextView android:id="@+id/loginTitle" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/login_account" android:textColor="@color/g_black" android:textSize="28sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:layout_marginTop="40dp" android:layout_marginStart="0dp" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" />
<!-- Subtitle --> <TextView android:id="@+id/loginSubtitle" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/please_login_with_registered_account" android:textColor="@color/g_gray700" android:textSize="14sp" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/loginTitle" />
<!-- Email Label --> <TextView android:id="@+id/emailLabel" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="32dp" android:text="@string/email_or_phone_number" android:textColor="@color/g_black" android:textSize="14sp" android:textStyle="bold" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/loginSubtitle" />
<!-- Email Input Field --> <EditText android:id="@+id/emailEditText" style="@style/editText" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="52dp" android:layout_marginStart="0dp" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:layout_marginEnd="0dp" android:autofillHints="emailAddress" android:background="@drawable/input_field_background" android:hint="@string/email" android:inputType="textEmailAddress" android:paddingStart="16dp" android:paddingTop="14dp" android:paddingEnd="16dp" android:paddingBottom="14dp" android:textSize="14sp" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/emailLabel" />
<!-- Password Label --> <TextView android:id="@+id/passwordLabel" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/password" android:textColor="@color/g_black" android:textSize="14sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:layout_marginTop="20dp" android:layout_marginStart="0dp" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/emailEditText" />
<!-- Password Input Field --> <EditText android:id="@+id/passwordEditText" style="@style/editText" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="52dp" android:layout_marginStart="0dp" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:layout_marginEnd="0dp" android:autofillHints="password" android:background="@drawable/input_field_background" android:hint="@string/password" android:inputType="textPassword" android:paddingStart="16dp" android:paddingTop="14dp" android:paddingEnd="16dp" android:paddingBottom="14dp" android:textSize="14sp" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/passwordLabel" />
<!-- Forgot Password Link --> <TextView android:id="@+id/forgotPasswordLink" style="@style/ForgotPasswordStyle" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/forgot_password_question" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" android:layout_marginEnd="0dp" android:foreground="?attr/selectableItemBackground" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/passwordEditText" />
<!-- Login Button --> <androidx.appcompat.widget.AppCompatButton android:id="@+id/loginButton" style="@style/blueButtonStyle" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="52dp" android:layout_marginStart="0dp" android:layout_marginTop="32dp" android:layout_marginEnd="0dp" android:text="@string/login" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/forgotPasswordLink" />
<!-- Or using other method --> <TextView android:id="@+id/orOtherMethod" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/or_using_other_method" android:textColor="@color/g_gray700" android:textSize="13sp" android:layout_marginTop="24dp" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/loginButton" />
<!-- Google Sign In Button --> <androidx.appcompat.widget.AppCompatButton android:id="@+id/googleSignInButton" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="48dp" android:layout_marginStart="0dp" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" android:layout_marginEnd="0dp" android:text="@string/sign_in_with_google" android:textColor="@color/g_gray700" android:textSize="14sp" android:background="@drawable/white_background" android:paddingStart="16dp" android:paddingEnd="16dp" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/orOtherMethod" />
<!-- Facebook Sign In Button --> <androidx.appcompat.widget.AppCompatButton android:id="@+id/facebookSignInButton" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="48dp" android:layout_marginStart="0dp" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:layout_marginEnd="0dp" android:layout_marginBottom="24dp" android:text="@string/sign_in_with_facebook" android:textColor="@color/white" android:textSize="14sp" android:background="@drawable/facebook_background" android:paddingStart="16dp" android:paddingEnd="16dp" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/googleSignInButton" />
</androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:fitsSystemWindows="true" android:paddingStart="24dp" android:paddingEnd="24dp" android:background="@color/white">
<!-- Title --> <TextView android:id="@+id/loginTitle" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/login_account" android:textColor="@color/g_black" android:textSize="28sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:layout_marginTop="40dp" android:layout_marginStart="0dp" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" />
<!-- Subtitle --> <TextView android:id="@+id/loginSubtitle" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/please_login_with_registered_account" android:textColor="@color/g_gray700" android:textSize="14sp" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/loginTitle" />
<!-- Email Label --> <TextView android:id="@+id/emailLabel" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="32dp" android:text="@string/email_or_phone_number" android:textColor="@color/g_black" android:textSize="14sp" android:textStyle="bold" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/loginSubtitle" />
<!-- Email Input Field --> <EditText android:id="@+id/emailEditText" style="@style/editText" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="52dp" android:layout_marginStart="0dp" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:layout_marginEnd="0dp" android:autofillHints="emailAddress" android:background="@drawable/input_field_background" android:hint="@string/email" android:inputType="textEmailAddress" android:paddingStart="16dp" android:paddingTop="14dp" android:paddingEnd="16dp" android:paddingBottom="14dp" android:textSize="14sp" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/emailLabel" />
<!-- Password Label --> <TextView android:id="@+id/passwordLabel" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/password" android:textColor="@color/g_black" android:textSize="14sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:layout_marginTop="20dp" android:layout_marginStart="0dp" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/emailEditText" />
<!-- Password Input Field --> <EditText android:id="@+id/passwordEditText" style="@style/editText" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="52dp" android:layout_marginStart="0dp" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:layout_marginEnd="0dp" android:autofillHints="password" android:background="@drawable/input_field_background" android:hint="@string/password" android:inputType="textPassword" android:paddingStart="16dp" android:paddingTop="14dp" android:paddingEnd="16dp" android:paddingBottom="14dp" android:textSize="14sp" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/passwordLabel" />
<!-- Forgot Password Link --> <TextView android:id="@+id/forgotPasswordLink" style="@style/ForgotPasswordStyle" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/forgot_password_question" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" android:layout_marginEnd="0dp" android:foreground="?attr/selectableItemBackground" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/passwordEditText" />
<!-- Login Button --> <androidx.appcompat.widget.AppCompatButton android:id="@+id/loginButton" style="@style/blueButtonStyle" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="52dp" android:layout_marginStart="0dp" android:layout_marginTop="32dp" android:layout_marginEnd="0dp" android:text="@string/login" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/forgotPasswordLink" />
<!-- Or using other method --> <TextView android:id="@+id/orOtherMethod" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/or_using_other_method" android:textColor="@color/g_gray700" android:textSize="13sp" android:layout_marginTop="24dp" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/loginButton" />
<!-- Google Sign In Button --> <androidx.appcompat.widget.AppCompatButton android:id="@+id/googleSignInButton" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="48dp" android:layout_marginStart="48dp" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" android:layout_marginEnd="48dp" android:text="@string/sign_in_with_google" android:textColor="@color/g_gray700" android:textSize="14sp" android:background="@drawable/white_background" android:paddingStart="16dp" android:paddingEnd="16dp" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/orOtherMethod" />
<!-- Facebook Sign In Button --> <androidx.appcompat.widget.AppCompatButton android:id="@+id/facebookSignInButton" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="48dp" android:layout_marginStart="0dp" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:layout_marginEnd="0dp" android:layout_marginBottom="24dp" android:text="@string/sign_in_with_facebook" android:textColor="@color/white" android:textSize="14sp" android:background="@drawable/facebook_background" android:paddingStart="16dp" android:paddingEnd="16dp" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/googleSignInButton" />
</androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>

option.name: filePath
option.value: /fragment_payment (snapshot).xml

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent">
<ScrollView android:id="@+id/paymentScroll" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="0dp" android:fillViewport="true" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent">
<LinearLayout android:id="@+id/paymentContent" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="20dp">
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvPaymentTitle" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/payment_result_title" android:textSize="20sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvOrderNumber" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:text="@string/payment_order_number_placeholder" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvPaymentMethod" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:text="@string/payment_method_label_placeholder" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvPaymentStatus" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:text="@string/payment_status_label_placeholder" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvTotalAmount" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:text="@string/payment_total_label_placeholder" />
<Button android:id="@+id/buttonPayNow" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="20dp" android:text="@string/payment_open_vnpay" />
<Button android:id="@+id/buttonCheckStatus" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:text="@string/payment_check_status" />
<Button android:id="@+id/buttonViewOrder" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:text="@string/payment_view_order" />
<Button android:id="@+id/buttonBackHome" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:text="@string/payment_back_home" /> </LinearLayout> </ScrollView>
<ProgressBar android:id="@+id/progressBar" android:layout_width="48dp" android:layout_height="48dp" android:visibility="gone" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" />
</androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>

option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:padding="24dp">
<LinearLayout android:id="@+id/paymentContent" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:gravity="center" android:orientation="vertical" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent">
<ImageView android:id="@+id/ivOrderSuccess" android:layout_width="140dp" android:layout_height="140dp" android:contentDescription="@string/order_success_image" android:src="@drawable/ic_empty_box" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvOrderSuccessTitle" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" android:text="@string/order_success_title" android:textSize="18sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvOrderSuccessSubtitle" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:gravity="center" android:text="@string/order_success_subtitle" android:textAlignment="center" android:textColor="@color/g_gray700" android:textSize="13sp" />
<Button android:id="@+id/buttonOrderTracking" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="24dp" android:text="@string/order_tracking" /> </LinearLayout>
</androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <ScrollView xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="@color/white">
<androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:fitsSystemWindows="true" android:paddingStart="24dp" android:paddingEnd="24dp" android:paddingTop="24dp" android:paddingBottom="24dp">
<!-- Title --> <EditText android:id="@+id/emailEditText" style="@style/editText" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="52dp" android:layout_marginStart="32dp" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:layout_marginEnd="32dp" android:autofillHints="emailAddress" android:background="@drawable/input_field_background" android:hint="@string/email" android:inputType="textEmailAddress" android:paddingStart="16dp" android:paddingTop="14dp" android:paddingEnd="16dp" android:paddingBottom="14dp" android:textSize="14sp" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintHorizontal_bias="1.0" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/emailLabel" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/registerTitle" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginStart="32dp" android:layout_marginTop="20dp" android:text="@string/create_account" android:textColor="@color/g_black" android:textSize="28sp" android:textStyle="bold" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" />
<!-- Subtitle --> <TextView android:id="@+id/registerSubtitle" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginStart="32dp" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:text="@string/join_us_to_get_started" android:textColor="@color/g_gray700" android:textSize="14sp" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/registerTitle" />
<!-- Username Label --> <TextView android:id="@+id/usernameLabel" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginStart="32dp" android:layout_marginTop="32dp" android:text="@string/username" android:textColor="@color/g_black" android:textSize="14sp" android:textStyle="bold" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/registerSubtitle" />
<!-- Username Input Field --> <EditText android:id="@+id/usernameEditText" style="@style/editText" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="52dp" android:layout_marginStart="32dp" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:layout_marginEnd="32dp" android:autofillHints="username" android:background="@drawable/input_field_background" android:hint="@string/username" android:inputType="text" android:paddingStart="16dp" android:paddingTop="14dp" android:paddingEnd="16dp" android:paddingBottom="14dp" android:textSize="14sp" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/usernameLabel" />
<!-- Email Label --> <TextView android:id="@+id/emailLabel" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginStart="32dp" android:layout_marginTop="20dp" android:text="@string/email" android:textColor="@color/g_black" android:textSize="14sp" android:textStyle="bold" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/usernameEditText" />
<!-- Email Input Field -->
<!-- Password Label --> <TextView android:id="@+id/passwordLabel" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginStart="32dp" android:layout_marginTop="20dp" android:text="@string/password" android:textColor="@color/g_black" android:textSize="14sp" android:textStyle="bold" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/emailEditText" />
<!-- Password Input Field --> <EditText android:id="@+id/passwordEditText" style="@style/editText" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="52dp" android:layout_marginStart="32dp" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:layout_marginEnd="32dp" android:autofillHints="password" android:background="@drawable/input_field_background" android:hint="@string/password" android:inputType="textPassword" android:paddingStart="16dp" android:paddingTop="14dp" android:paddingEnd="16dp" android:paddingBottom="14dp" android:textSize="14sp" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/passwordLabel" />
<!-- Confirm Password Label --> <TextView android:id="@+id/confirmPasswordLabel" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/confirm_password" android:textColor="@color/g_black" android:textSize="14sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:layout_marginTop="20dp" android:layout_marginStart="0dp" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/passwordEditText" />
<!-- Confirm Password Input Field --> <EditText android:id="@+id/confirmPasswordEditText" style="@style/editText" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="52dp" android:layout_marginStart="32dp" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:layout_marginEnd="32dp" android:autofillHints="password" android:background="@drawable/input_field_background" android:hint="@string/confirm_password" android:inputType="textPassword" android:paddingStart="16dp" android:paddingTop="14dp" android:paddingEnd="16dp" android:paddingBottom="14dp" android:textSize="14sp" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/confirmPasswordLabel" />
<!-- Register Button --> <androidx.appcompat.widget.AppCompatButton android:id="@+id/registerButton" style="@style/blueButtonStyle" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="52dp" android:layout_marginStart="24dp" android:layout_marginTop="32dp" android:layout_marginEnd="24dp" android:text="@string/register" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/confirmPasswordEditText" />
<!-- Or using other method --> <TextView android:id="@+id/orOtherMethod" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/or_using_other_method" android:textColor="@color/g_gray700" android:textSize="13sp" android:layout_marginTop="24dp" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/registerButton" />
<!-- Google Sign Up Button --> <androidx.appcompat.widget.AppCompatButton android:id="@+id/googleSignUpButton" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="48dp" android:layout_marginStart="48dp" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" android:layout_marginEnd="48dp" android:text="@string/sign_up_with_google" android:textColor="@color/g_gray700" android:textSize="14sp" android:background="@drawable/white_background" android:paddingStart="16dp" android:paddingEnd="16dp" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/orOtherMethod" />
<!-- Facebook Sign Up Button --> <androidx.appcompat.widget.AppCompatButton android:id="@+id/facebookSignUpButton" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="48dp" android:layout_marginStart="48dp" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:layout_marginEnd="48dp" android:layout_marginBottom="24dp" android:text="@string/sign_up_with_facebook" android:textColor="@color/white" android:textSize="14sp" android:background="@drawable/facebook_background" android:paddingStart="16dp" android:paddingEnd="16dp" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/googleSignUpButton" />
</androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>
</ScrollView>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <ScrollView xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="@color/white">
<androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:fitsSystemWindows="true" android:paddingStart="24dp" android:paddingEnd="24dp" android:paddingTop="24dp" android:paddingBottom="24dp">
<!-- Left Guideline (20% from left) --> <androidx.constraintlayout.widget.Guideline android:id="@+id/leftGuideline" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:orientation="vertical" app:layout_constraintGuide_percent="0.2" />
<!-- Right Guideline (20% from right / 80% from left) --> <androidx.constraintlayout.widget.Guideline android:id="@+id/rightGuideline" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:orientation="vertical" app:layout_constraintGuide_percent="0.8" />
<!-- Title --> <EditText android:id="@+id/emailEditText" style="@style/editText" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="52dp" android:layout_marginStart="32dp" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:layout_marginEnd="32dp" android:autofillHints="emailAddress" android:background="@drawable/input_field_background" android:hint="@string/email" android:inputType="textEmailAddress" android:paddingStart="16dp" android:paddingTop="14dp" android:paddingEnd="16dp" android:paddingBottom="14dp" android:textSize="14sp" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintHorizontal_bias="1.0" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/emailLabel" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/registerTitle" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginStart="32dp" android:layout_marginTop="20dp" android:text="@string/create_account" android:textColor="@color/g_black" android:textSize="28sp" android:textStyle="bold" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" />
<!-- Subtitle --> <TextView android:id="@+id/registerSubtitle" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginStart="32dp" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:text="@string/join_us_to_get_started" android:textColor="@color/g_gray700" android:textSize="14sp" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/registerTitle" />
<!-- Username Label --> <TextView android:id="@+id/usernameLabel" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginStart="32dp" android:layout_marginTop="32dp" android:text="@string/username" android:textColor="@color/g_black" android:textSize="14sp" android:textStyle="bold" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/registerSubtitle" />
<!-- Username Input Field --> <EditText android:id="@+id/usernameEditText" style="@style/editText" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="52dp" android:layout_marginStart="32dp" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:layout_marginEnd="32dp" android:autofillHints="username" android:background="@drawable/input_field_background" android:hint="@string/username" android:inputType="text" android:paddingStart="16dp" android:paddingTop="14dp" android:paddingEnd="16dp" android:paddingBottom="14dp" android:textSize="14sp" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/usernameLabel" />
<!-- Email Label --> <TextView android:id="@+id/emailLabel" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginStart="32dp" android:layout_marginTop="20dp" android:text="@string/email" android:textColor="@color/g_black" android:textSize="14sp" android:textStyle="bold" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/usernameEditText" />
<!-- Email Input Field -->
<!-- Password Label --> <TextView android:id="@+id/passwordLabel" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginStart="32dp" android:layout_marginTop="20dp" android:text="@string/password" android:textColor="@color/g_black" android:textSize="14sp" android:textStyle="bold" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/emailEditText" />
<!-- Password Input Field --> <EditText android:id="@+id/passwordEditText" style="@style/editText" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="52dp" android:layout_marginStart="32dp" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:layout_marginEnd="32dp" android:autofillHints="password" android:background="@drawable/input_field_background" android:hint="@string/password" android:inputType="textPassword" android:paddingStart="16dp" android:paddingTop="14dp" android:paddingEnd="16dp" android:paddingBottom="14dp" android:textSize="14sp" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/passwordLabel" />
<!-- Confirm Password Label --> <TextView android:id="@+id/confirmPasswordLabel" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/confirm_password" android:textColor="@color/g_black" android:textSize="14sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:layout_marginTop="20dp" android:layout_marginStart="0dp" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/passwordEditText" />
<!-- Confirm Password Input Field --> <EditText android:id="@+id/confirmPasswordEditText" style="@style/editText" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="52dp" android:layout_marginStart="32dp" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:layout_marginEnd="32dp" android:autofillHints="password" android:background="@drawable/input_field_background" android:hint="@string/confirm_password" android:inputType="textPassword" android:paddingStart="16dp" android:paddingTop="14dp" android:paddingEnd="16dp" android:paddingBottom="14dp" android:textSize="14sp" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/confirmPasswordLabel" />
<!-- Register Button --> <androidx.appcompat.widget.AppCompatButton android:id="@+id/registerButton" style="@style/blueButtonStyle" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="52dp" android:layout_marginStart="24dp" android:layout_marginTop="32dp" android:layout_marginEnd="24dp" android:text="@string/register" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/confirmPasswordEditText" />
<!-- Or using other method --> <TextView android:id="@+id/orOtherMethod" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/or_using_other_method" android:textColor="@color/g_gray700" android:textSize="13sp" android:layout_marginTop="24dp" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/registerButton" />
<!-- Google Sign Up Button --> <androidx.appcompat.widget.AppCompatButton android:id="@+id/googleSignUpButton" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="48dp" android:layout_marginStart="48dp" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" android:layout_marginEnd="48dp" android:text="@string/sign_up_with_google" android:textColor="@color/g_gray700" android:textSize="14sp" android:background="@drawable/white_background" android:paddingStart="16dp" android:paddingEnd="16dp" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/orOtherMethod" />
<!-- Facebook Sign Up Button --> <androidx.appcompat.widget.AppCompatButton android:id="@+id/facebookSignUpButton" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="48dp" android:layout_marginStart="48dp" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:layout_marginEnd="48dp" android:layout_marginBottom="24dp" android:text="@string/sign_up_with_facebook" android:textColor="@color/white" android:textSize="14sp" android:background="@drawable/facebook_background" android:paddingStart="16dp" android:paddingEnd="16dp" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/googleSignUpButton" />
