option.name: filePath
option.value: /fragment_search (snapshot).xml

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="#FFFFFF" android:padding="16dp">
<!-- Header / Search Bar --> <ImageView android:id="@+id/iv_back" android:layout_width="24dp" android:layout_height="24dp" android:src="@drawable/ic_back" app:tint="#000000" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="@id/et_search" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="@id/et_search" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" />
<EditText android:id="@+id/et_search" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="48dp" android:layout_marginStart="16dp" android:background="@drawable/bg_search_input" android:drawableStart="@drawable/ic_search" android:drawablePadding="8dp" android:hint="" android:inputType="text" android:paddingStart="16dp" android:paddingEnd="16dp" android:textColor="#000000" android:textSize="16sp" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toEndOf="@id/iv_back" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" />
<!-- Last Search --> <TextView android:id="@+id/tv_last_search_title" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Last Search" android:textColor="#000000" android:textSize="18sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:layout_marginTop="32dp" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/et_search" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tv_clear_all" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Clear All" android:textColor="#673AB7" android:textSize="14sp" android:textStyle="bold" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="@id/tv_last_search_title" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="@id/tv_last_search_title" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" />
<!-- Chips for Last Search --> <LinearLayout android:id="@+id/ll_chips_row1" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/tv_last_search_title">
<TextView android:id="@+id/chip_electronics" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:background="@drawable/bg_search_chip" android:text="Electronics \u00D7" android:textColor="#757575" android:paddingStart="16dp" android:paddingEnd="16dp" android:paddingTop="8dp" android:paddingBottom="8dp" android:layout_marginEnd="8dp" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/chip_pants" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:background="@drawable/bg_search_chip" android:text="Pants \u00D7" android:textColor="#757575" android:paddingStart="16dp" android:paddingEnd="16dp" android:paddingTop="8dp" android:paddingBottom="8dp" /> </LinearLayout>
<LinearLayout android:id="@+id/ll_chips_row2" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/ll_chips_row1">
<TextView android:id="@+id/chip_three_second" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:background="@drawable/bg_search_chip" android:text="Three Second \u00D7" android:textColor="#757575" android:paddingStart="16dp" android:paddingEnd="16dp" android:paddingTop="8dp" android:paddingBottom="8dp" android:layout_marginEnd="8dp" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/chip_long_shirt" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:background="@drawable/bg_search_chip" android:text="Long shirt \u00D7" android:textColor="#757575" android:paddingStart="16dp" android:paddingEnd="16dp" android:paddingTop="8dp" android:paddingBottom="8dp" /> </LinearLayout>
<!-- Popular Search --> <TextView android:id="@+id/tv_popular_search_title" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Popular Search" android:textColor="#000000" android:textSize="18sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:layout_marginTop="32dp" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/ll_chips_row2" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" />
<androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView android:id="@+id/rv_popular_search" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="0dp" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/tv_popular_search_title" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" />
</androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="#FFFFFF" android:padding="16dp">
<!-- Header / Search Bar --> <ImageView android:id="@+id/iv_back" android:layout_width="24dp" android:layout_height="24dp" android:src="@drawable/ic_back" app:tint="#000000" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="@id/et_search" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="@id/et_search" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" />
<EditText android:id="@+id/et_search" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="48dp" android:layout_marginStart="16dp" android:background="@drawable/bg_search_input" android:drawableStart="@drawable/ic_search" android:drawablePadding="8dp" android:hint="" android:inputType="text" android:paddingStart="16dp" android:paddingEnd="16dp" android:textColor="#000000" android:textSize="16sp" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toEndOf="@id/iv_back" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" />
<!-- Last Search --> <TextView android:id="@+id/tv_last_search_title" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Last Search" android:textColor="#000000" android:textSize="18sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:layout_marginTop="32dp" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/et_search" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tv_clear_all" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Clear All" android:textColor="#673AB7" android:textSize="14sp" android:textStyle="bold" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="@id/tv_last_search_title" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="@id/tv_last_search_title" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" />
<!-- Chips for Last Search --> <LinearLayout android:id="@+id/ll_chips_row1" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/tv_last_search_title">
<TextView android:id="@+id/chip_electronics" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:background="@drawable/bg_search_chip" android:text="Electronics \u00D7" android:textColor="#757575" android:paddingStart="16dp" android:paddingEnd="16dp" android:paddingTop="8dp" android:paddingBottom="8dp" android:layout_marginEnd="8dp" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/chip_pants" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:background="@drawable/bg_search_chip" android:text="Pants \u00D7" android:textColor="#757575" android:paddingStart="16dp" android:paddingEnd="16dp" android:paddingTop="8dp" android:paddingBottom="8dp" /> </LinearLayout>
<LinearLayout android:id="@+id/ll_chips_row2" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/ll_chips_row1">
<TextView android:id="@+id/chip_three_second" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:background="@drawable/bg_search_chip" android:text="Three Second \u00D7" android:textColor="#757575" android:paddingStart="16dp" android:paddingEnd="16dp" android:paddingTop="8dp" android:paddingBottom="8dp" android:layout_marginEnd="8dp" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/chip_long_shirt" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:background="@drawable/bg_search_chip" android:text="Long shirt \u00D7" android:textColor="#757575" android:paddingStart="16dp" android:paddingEnd="16dp" android:paddingTop="8dp" android:paddingBottom="8dp" /> </LinearLayout>
<!-- Popular Search --> <TextView android:id="@+id/tv_popular_search_title" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Popular Search" android:textColor="#000000" android:textSize="18sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:layout_marginTop="32dp" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/ll_chips_row2" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" />
<androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView android:id="@+id/rv_popular_search" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="0dp" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/tv_popular_search_title" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools" tools:listitem="@layout/item_popular_search" />
</androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>

option.name: filePath
option.value: /item_product (snapshot).xml

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <androidx.cardview.widget.CardView xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_margin="8dp" app:cardElevation="4dp" app:cardCornerRadius="12dp" app:cardBackgroundColor="@color/white">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:background="@color/white">
<!-- Product Image --> <ImageView android:id="@+id/ivProductImage" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="160dp" android:scaleType="centerCrop" android:contentDescription="Product Image" />
<!-- Product Info Container --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="12dp" android:background="@color/white">
<!-- Product Name --> <TextView android:id="@+id/tvProductName" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Product Name" android:textSize="14sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="@color/g_black" android:maxLines="2" android:ellipsize="end" />
<!-- Product Description --> <TextView android:id="@+id/tvProductDescription" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/description" android:textSize="12sp" android:textColor="@color/g_gray500" android:maxLines="1" android:ellipsize="end" android:layout_marginTop="6dp" android:lineSpacingExtra="2dp" />
<!-- Product Price --> <TextView android:id="@+id/tvProductPrice" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="$0.00" android:textSize="16sp" android:textColor="@color/g_blue" android:textStyle="bold" android:layout_marginTop="10dp" />
<Button android:id="@+id/button_create_mockup" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="40dp" android:layout_marginTop="10dp" android:backgroundTint="@color/g_green" android:text="@string/create_mockup" android:textAllCaps="false" android:textColor="@color/white" android:textSize="12sp" android:visibility="gone" />
</LinearLayout>
</LinearLayout>
</androidx.cardview.widget.CardView>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <androidx.cardview.widget.CardView xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_margin="8dp" app:cardElevation="4dp" app:cardCornerRadius="12dp" app:cardBackgroundColor="@color/white">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:background="@color/white">
<!-- Product Image --> <ImageView android:id="@+id/ivProductImage" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="160dp" android:scaleType="centerCrop" android:contentDescription="Product Image" />
<!-- Product Info Container --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="12dp" android:background="@color/white">
<!-- Product Name --> <TextView android:id="@+id/tvProductName" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Product Name" android:textSize="14sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="@color/g_black" android:maxLines="2" android:ellipsize="end" />
<!-- Product Description --> <TextView android:id="@+id/tvProductDescription" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/description" android:textSize="12sp" android:textColor="@color/g_gray500" android:maxLines="1" android:ellipsize="end" android:layout_marginTop="6dp" android:lineSpacingExtra="2dp" />
<!-- Product Price --> <TextView android:id="@+id/tvProductPrice" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="$0.00" android:textSize="16sp" android:textColor="@color/g_blue" android:textStyle="bold" android:layout_marginTop="10dp" /> </LinearLayout>
</LinearLayout>
</androidx.cardview.widget.CardView>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <navigation xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools" android:id="@+id/shopping_graph" app:startDestination="@id/navigation_home">
<fragment android:id="@+id/navigation_home" android:name="com.example.btl.Fragments.Shopping.HomeFragment" android:label="Home" tools:layout="@layout/fragment_home"> <action android:id="@+id/action_home_to_detail_product" app:destination="@id/detailProductFragment" app:enterAnim="@anim/slide_in_up" app:exitAnim="@anim/slide_out_down" /> </fragment> <fragment android:id="@+id/navigation_shop" android:name="com.example.btl.Fragments.Shopping.CategoryProductsFragment" android:label="Shop" tools:layout="@layout/fragment_category_products"> <action android:id="@+id/action_shop_to_detail_product" app:destination="@id/detailProductFragment" app:enterAnim="@anim/slide_in_up" app:exitAnim="@anim/slide_out_down" /> </fragment> <fragment android:id="@+id/navigation_cart" android:name="com.example.btl.Fragments.Shopping.CartFragment" android:label="Cart" tools:layout="@layout/fragment_cart"/> <fragment android:id="@+id/navigation_profile" android:name="com.example.btl.Fragments.Shopping.ProfileFragment" android:label="Profile" tools:layout="@layout/fragment_profile"/> <fragment android:id="@+id/detailProductFragment" android:name="com.example.btl.Fragments.Shopping.DetailProductFragment" android:label="Product Detail" tools:layout="@layout/fragment_detail_product"/> </navigation>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <navigation xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools" android:id="@+id/shopping_graph" app:startDestination="@id/navigation_home">
<!-- HOME FRAGMENT --> <fragment android:id="@+id/navigation_home" android:name="com.example.btl.Fragments.Shopping.HomeFragment" android:label="Home" tools:layout="@layout/fragment_home"> <action android:id="@+id/action_home_to_detail_product" app:destination="@id/detailProductFragment" app:enterAnim="@anim/slide_in_up" app:exitAnim="@anim/slide_out_down" /> </fragment>
<!-- SHOP FRAGMENT --> <fragment android:id="@+id/navigation_shop" android:name="com.example.btl.Fragments.Shopping.CategoryProductsFragment" android:label="Shop" tools:layout="@layout/fragment_category_products"> <action android:id="@+id/action_shop_to_detail_product" app:destination="@id/detailProductFragment" app:enterAnim="@anim/slide_in_up" app:exitAnim="@anim/slide_out_down" /> </fragment>
<!-- CART FRAGMENT --> <fragment android:id="@+id/navigation_cart" android:name="com.example.btl.Fragments.Shopping.CartFragment" android:label="Cart" tools:layout="@layout/fragment_cart" />
<!-- PROFILE FRAGMENT --> <fragment android:id="@+id/navigation_profile" android:name="com.example.btl.Fragments.Shopping.ProfileFragment" android:label="Profile" tools:layout="@layout/fragment_profile" />
<!-- SEARCH FRAGMENT --> <fragment android:id="@+id/navigation_search" android:name="com.example.btl.Fragments.Shopping.SearchFragment" android:label="Search" tools:layout="@layout/fragment_search"> <action android:id="@+id/action_search_to_detail_product" app:destination="@id/detailProductFragment" app:enterAnim="@anim/slide_in_up" app:exitAnim="@anim/slide_out_down" /> </fragment>
<!-- DETAIL PRODUCT FRAGMENT --> <fragment android:id="@+id/detailProductFragment" android:name="com.example.btl.Fragments.Shopping.DetailProductFragment" android:label="Product Detail" tools:layout="@layout/fragment_detail_product" />
</navigation>
